items.title: Eicher Motors Q3 Results: Cons PAT jumps 21% YoY to Rs 1,420 crore, revenue surges 23%
items.description: Eicher Motor Q3 Results: Two-wheeler major Eicher Motors reported a 21% jump in its December quarter consolidated net profit at Rs 1,420 crore compared to Rs 1,171 crore reported in the year ago period. The profit after tax (PAT) is attributable to the owners of the company.
